use_cases: AI-powered chat interface for web applications with message history display
Customer support widget that provides instant automated responses
Inline AI assistant embedded in SaaS products for contextual help
Interactive messaging system with typing indicators and conversational flow
ai_summary: An interactive AI message bar component featuring a chat interface with user and AI message display, typing indicators with simulated responses, and smooth auto-scrolling. The component includes input validation, message history management, and clear chat functionality, making it suitable for embedding conversational AI experiences in web applications.
